chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.197 of 2017 Sudheer Ahmed & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply. 2. For orders on CMA 1170/17 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 1171/17 Dated: 31.10.2023 Mr. Tajammul Hussain Lodhi for appellants. -.-.- Learned counsel, on instructions, does not press this appeal along with pending applications. Dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
